reviews.text:
Hire Distinctive Mountain Events/Ebs Long!!!!! There are no words to fully describe the gratitude, appreciation and admiration I have for Ebs, but I do know that hiring her was by far the best decision in our entire wedding planning journey. From the very first phone call, it was clear we were in great hands. She was not only incredibly knowledgeable about so many things, but also warm and friendly, which made us feel at ease throughout the entire planning process. Every question we had—no matter how big or small—was met with patience and thorough answers, and trust me, we had a million questions. Our wedding day truly felt like a dream come true, and we owe so much of that to Ebs’s unwavering dedication. She took the time to understand our vision and then brought it to life, and it was even more than we hoped for. Ebs recommended multiple options for all of our vendors, and we chose her recommendations and they were perfect matches for us. You can genuinely feel how much she loves her job and her clients, and many of our vendors echoed this sentiment.

Our lives were unexpectedly turned upside-down three weeks before our wedding and I had 100% confidence and trust in Ebs to handle everything while I stepped away to be with family. She handled that situation with such grace and compassion, making sure all of our last minute changes and requests were met.

On our wedding day, we felt completely at ease knowing that she was in control. I’m as “type A“ as they get, and although I’m typically perpetually stressed out, I was SO uncharacteristically chill on my wedding day, which I believe is because I knew we had Ebs on our side. In the end our day was flawless, and we couldn't have done it without her expertise and support.

I often joke that—without Ebs—I would have cried a hundred times during planning and probably would have eloped! She made this entire journey not only manageable but truly enjoyable, to the point where I wish I could do it all over again.

If you're looking for a wedding planner who offers unparalleled expertise and feels like family on your special day, look no further than Distinctive Mountain Events/Ebs We honestly love her so much!! Cannot recommend enough! :)

We absolutely loved working with Ebs! She truly made the entire process seamless and stress-free. She balanced so much for us, kept everything organized, and honestly saved us money while making the day about getting married, not logistics. We are so thankful for her and couldn’t recommend her more highly. Is it odd that I miss our texts and calls?? Thank you again Ebs!!

From the moment we began planning our Breckenridge wedding, Ebs with Distinctive Mountain Events was an absolute dream to work with. Her dedication and expertise transformed our unique vision for our day into a breathtaking reality. She took the time to understand our style and preferences, guiding us through every step of the planning process.

What truly set her apart was her exceptional ability to communicate with us, our families and our vendors. She handled all communications seamlessly, allowing us to focus on the joy of our upcoming day rather than the logistics.

On the wedding day itself, Ebs went above and beyond. She not only set up and took down all our decorations with such care, but she also made sure that my husband and I had the chance to enjoy every moment—including all the delicious food! Her thoughtfulness in ensuring we were taken care of made us feel truly supported and relaxed throughout the day.

Most importantly, she eased our fears and worries at every turn. Her calm presence and unwavering support made a world of difference. We couldn’t have asked for a better partner in this journey. If you’re looking for someone who will not only meet your expectations but exceed them, look no further than Distinctive Mountain Events. We are forever grateful for her incredible work and couldn’t have imagined our wedding without her!

Planning a wedding out of the state can be hard but with Ebs I felt so confident that everything would go perfectly! Ebs was so sweet and nice to work with. She made me think about little details I never would have thought about and logistics of transportation and rentals that never crossed my mind. I felt like she always really listened to me and heard all the details that were special to me. Leading up to the wedding I wasn’t worried at all about how the day would go or about how everything looked; I just got to be excited to finally marry my best friend! And that is such a joy to have on your wedding day to not have to worry about anything else. Ebs made sure to get us perfect vendors to match our style. And Natalie was absolutely amazing on our wedding day making sure everything me and Ebs had planned actually came true! And holy cow did it! I was blown away with how everything came together. Me and Lucas had such an amazing day, exactly how we always dreamed of it (ceremony in the mountains in the morning, skiing in the afternoon, and a long relaxing delicious dinner). I never could of made our dream wedding a reality planning it myself. Ebs and Natalie you both rock! Thank you!

I am not someone that plans events, and had a series of questions. Ebs was a brilliant wedding planner that answered them all. On the day of the wedding her team took care of us, like we had our own personal butler. Always positive and friendly, available very often and quick to respond to our emails, we were VERY lucky to find her and her team. Best wedding ever!! All of my family, friends agreed.
